description: The CT Cranium DICOM dataset is already loaded in InVesalius 3. An ENT surgeon needs a 3D model of the paranasal sinuses and air spaces for pre-operative planning. Create a segmentation mask using a custom Hounsfield Unit threshold range of -1024 to -200 HU to capture air spaces and generate a 3D surface from this mask. Export the 3D surface as an STL file to /home/ga/Documents/air_spaces.stl and save the InVesalius project to /home/ga/Documents/air_project.inv3. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
